name: hkx-docs-update
description: Evidence-backed documentation update: explore, update docs/codemaps, then review accuracy.

chain.label: Source of truth
chain.task:
Collect source-of-truth evidence for the documentation update:

{task}

Identify code, configs, commands, and existing docs that must stay consistent.
Do not modify project/source files; write findings to the configured output artifact.

chain.label: Update docs
chain.task:
Update documentation for:

{task}

Evidence:
{outputs.context}

Rules:
- Sole writer for the active worktree.
- Prefer local evidence over invention.
- Preserve hand-written intent and examples unless contradicted by code.
- Call out verification gaps explicitly.

Return changed docs, preserved sections, and remaining gaps.

chain.label: Docs accuracy
